creator: nick@anywi.com
text:
The udbp driver should be removed from the kernel in favour of the cdce driver.
It supports a few out of date devices. Two of those I believe have never found
their way into shops. And the Prolific 2301 might be very similar to the 2501
which is supported by the cdce driver.

Note: I wrote the udbp driver 5 years ago and never had anyone report a bug or
question on it to me, so I believe it isn't used.
